boundaries.rule: Put business logic in `src-tauri/src/managers/`, not in frontend or `commands/`.
Keep one authoritative backend implementation for dual-path logic (preview + export). Frontend consumes it verbatim.
Use microseconds for backend timestamps (matching FFmpeg `AV_TIME_BASE`).
Use i18next keys for all UI strings — never hardcode user-visible text.
Run `cargo clippy` clean before claiming backend work done.
Run `npm run lint` clean before claiming frontend work done.
Adding a new Rust crate or npm dependency. Invoke `dep-hygiene` skill.
Any database/storage schema or project file format change.
No hosted inference. No runtime network calls to hosted LLM/transcription/caption APIs. Local-only.
boundaries.why: Toaster is local-only inference. Adding a phone-home dependency requires explicit approval.

boundaries.rule: No video source swapping. Never swap the <video> element source to an audio preview file.
No frontend timeline logic. Keep-segment/time-mapping authority lives in the backend. Do not re-derive it in JS.
No dual-path duplication. Caption layout, word grouping, filler lists, keep-segments — one backend implementation, two consumers.
boundaries.why: The caption mismatch and hardcoded filler list bugs both came from violating this.

boundaries.rule: No secrets or API keys in committed code.
